description_long: This object consists of three distinct graveyard elements: a traditional upright tombstone with a rounded top and a small cross, a larger rectangular stone monument with a sloped roof-like top, and a tree stump marker with visible growth rings and a cut branch. The tombstone is dark gray with a slightly weathered texture and faint engravings. The central monument is made of lighter gray stone, featuring a stepped base and a prominent, overhanging cap. The tree stump marker is brown, mimicking the appearance of cut wood, and adds a naturalistic touch to the arrangement. All three elements are set on flat bases, suitable for placement in a cemetery or memorial park. The materials and weathering suggest these are durable, outdoor grave markers.
description: A set of three graveyard markers: a dark upright tombstone, a large gray stone monument, and a realistic brown tree stump marker.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright tombstone, central stone monument, and tree stump marker side by side.
description_view_1: Side view with the tree stump marker in the foreground and the stone monument and tombstone aligned behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the tree stump, stone monument, and tombstone, with less detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, with the tombstone in the foreground and the tree stump and monument behind.
